title: Colony PCR
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"4jk36","text":"Colony PCR using DreamTaq Green PCR mastermix (based on manufacturer ThermoFisher Scientific protocol).","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: For 1 PCR reaction, mix the following - multiply the amounts for the number of reactions you need, prepare 1.1x the final volume needed for your reactions: %s %s PCR master mix 5 ul forward primer (10 uM) 0,2 ul reverse primer (10 uM 0,2 ul template DNA - water 4.6 ul total 10 ul

PCR cycling protocol: (Use the lower Tm value of your primer pair) %s %s step temperature time number of cycles initial denaturation 95 3min 1 denaturation 95 30s annealing Tm-5°C 30s 30 extension 72 1min/kb final extension 72 15min 1 hold 4 0 1
creator: Snehadri Sinha
